enrichment.short_description: Live chat and AI chatbot platform combining a Mira AI agent with human operator handover for website and e-commerce support.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Smartsupp offers live chat, AI chatbots, and a Mira AI agent for e-commerce sites, with a free plan and paid tiers from $17/month.

features.title: Live Chat
features.description: Real-time messaging widget for websites and online stores.

features.title: Mira AI Agent
features.description: AI shopping assistant that answers FAQs and recommends products, resolving common questions automatically.

features.title: AI Reply Assist
features.description: Suggests responses to human operators to speed up replies.

features.title: Automation Workflows
features.description: Automated messaging and routing rules for repetitive tasks.

features.title: Multichannel Inbox
features.description: Manages live chat, email, WhatsApp, and Facebook Messenger conversations in one place.

features.title: Reporting & Analytics
features.description: Tracks conversation and agent performance metrics.

features.title: Mobile Apps
features.description: iOS and Android apps for managing conversations on the go.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required
Native integrations with major e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento)
Mira AI agent can resolve routine questions without human involvement
Mobile apps for iOS and Android let agents respond on the go
cons: AI reply assists and Mira AI conversations are capped per plan, requiring upgrades for higher volume
5+ operator teams require the Expert or Ultimate plan
Full AI Agent capability is billed as a separate add-on from the core chat plans

faqs.question: Does Smartsupp have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes 1 operator, 25 conversations per month, and 14-day chat history at no cost.

faqs.question: Does Smartsupp use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, via a Mira AI Agent that answers FAQs and recommends products, plus an AI Reply Assist for human operators.

faqs.question: What channels does Smartsupp support?
faqs.answer: Live chat, WhatsApp, and Facebook Messenger are included on all plans, with additional email addresses on paid tiers.

faqs.question: Is there a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, Smartsupp offers iOS and Android apps.

faqs.question: How much does Smartsupp cost?
faqs.answer: Paid plans start at $17/month (Solo, billed annually) up to Ultimate from $280/month; the Mira AI Agent is a separate add-on starting at $16/month.

use_cases.title: E-commerce pre-sales support
use_cases.description: Live chat widget with native Shopify, WooCommerce, and Magento integrations for shopper questions.

use_cases.title: Small support teams
use_cases.description: Solo and Plus plans cover teams of 1-3 operators with unlimited conversations.

use_cases.title: AI-first customer service
use_cases.description: Mira AI Agent or Unlimited AI Agents plan for automating FAQ and product recommendation conversations.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Smartsupp?
paragraphs: Smartsupp is a customer engagement platform that combines live chat with AI automation. Its Mira AI Agent answers common shopping and support questions and recommends products, while human operators can step in when needed.
The platform includes automation workflows, a multichannel inbox covering WhatsApp and Facebook Messenger, and 80+ integrations with e-commerce platforms like Shopify, WooCommerce, and Magento.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Smartsupp is for
paragraphs: Smartsupp fits online stores and small-to-midsize support teams that want a free entry point plus the option to add AI-driven automation and multichannel messaging as they grow.

enrichment.short_description: Customer messaging platform combining live chat, AI chatbots, and multichannel support across email, Facebook, Telegram, and Viber.

faqs.question: Which plan includes chatbots?
faqs.answer: Chatbots, the knowledge base, and FAQ bot are only available on the Unlimited plan.

faqs.question: What channels does Chaport support?
faqs.answer: Live chat plus Facebook, Telegram, Viber, and email messaging.

faqs.answer: Web, iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS apps with synchronization.

use_cases.title: Small support teams

use_cases.title: Multichannel sales

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Chaport?
paragraphs: Chaport is a customer messaging platform that combines a live chat widget with AI chatbots, a knowledge base with FAQ bot, and multichannel messaging across email, Facebook, Telegram, and Viber.
It ships with synced apps for web, iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS, plus a Zapier integration for connecting to other business tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Chaport is for
paragraphs: Chaport suits startups and SMBs that want a free live chat entry point and can grow into chatbots and a self-service knowledge base on the Unlimited plan.

enrichment.short_description: Omnichannel customer service platform with live chat, an AI Agent, and channels like WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram.

faqs.question: Does JivoChat have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan supports 5 agents with online chat, social integrations, callback, and offline forms.

faqs.answer: WhatsApp is an add-on module priced at $27/month, separate from the core plans.

faqs.question: What does the AI Agent cost?
faqs.answer: The AI Agent add-on is priced at $69/agent/month.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day trial is available on paid plans.

faqs.question: What desktop platforms are supported?
faqs.answer: JivoChat offers desktop apps for Windows, Mac, and Linux, alongside mobile and web access.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is JivoChat?
paragraphs: JivoChat is an omnichannel customer service platform that unifies live chat with messengers such as WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram, plus an AI Agent that can resolve conversations automatically.
Paid add-on modules extend the core plans with WhatsApp, an OpenAI-powered AI Assistant, video calls, and a business phone system (Telephony Plus).

long_form_blocks.heading: Who JivoChat is for
paragraphs: JivoChat suits businesses that want a free entry-level live chat plan with the option to layer on social messaging channels and AI automation as support volume grows.

enrichment.short_description: Customer communication platform unifying live chat, chatbot, shared inbox, and email marketing in one dashboard.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, HelpCrunch offers a free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How is HelpCrunch priced?
faqs.answer: The Basic and PRO plans scale by monthly email volume; an Unlimited plan covers unlimited team members with 50,000 emails/month.

faqs.question: Are AI features included?
faqs.answer: AI Agents come with a free monthly conversation limit on paid plans, with paid extensions available; an AI Editor helps draft messages.

faqs.question: What mobile platforms are supported?
faqs.answer: HelpCrunch provides SDKs for iOS, Android, and React Native.

faqs.question: Where is HelpCrunch based?
faqs.answer: The company lists its headquarters in Wilmington, DE, USA.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is HelpCrunch?
paragraphs: HelpCrunch is a customer communication platform that unifies live chat, a chatbot, a shared team inbox, a knowledge base, and email marketing into one dashboard.
AI Agents are included on paid plans with a free monthly conversation allowance, and additional AI conversation or data-source capacity can be purchased as add-ons.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who HelpCrunch is for
paragraphs: HelpCrunch fits SaaS, e-commerce, and agency teams that want support, marketing, and lead-generation tools together rather than as separate products.

enrichment.short_description: Email-based ticketing system that turns customer emails into a shared team inbox for tracking and resolving support tickets.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: SupportBee is a simple email-based ticketing system with a shared team inbox, plans from $17/seat/month, and a 14-day free trial.

features.title: Team Inbox
features.description: Email-like shared inbox for assigning, commenting on, and resolving tickets as a team.

features.title: Knowledge Base (KBee)
features.description: Integrated self-service knowledge base.

features.title: Customer Portal
features.description: Lets customers track their ticket status.

features.title: Ticket Automation
features.description: Filters and rules for managing incoming tickets.

features.title: API Access
features.description: API available on both plans for custom integrations.

features.title: Customer Satisfaction Ratings
features.description: Collects CSAT ratings on resolved tickets.

features.title: Audit Trails
features.description: Tracks ticket and data history.

pros: Simple, email-like interface with a low learning curve
Transparent per-seat pricing with monthly or annual billing
Customer portal and satisfaction ratings included even on the entry plan
No long-term contract; cancel anytime
cons: No permanently free plan, only a 14-day trial
No AI features are advertised on the site
Only two pricing tiers, which may limit options for larger teams
Supported interface languages aren't documented on the site

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, SupportBee offers a 14-day free trial rather than a permanently free plan.

faqs.question: How much does SupportBee cost?
faqs.answer: The Startup plan is $17/seat/month billed annually ($20/seat monthly); Enterprise is $21/seat/month billed annually ($25/seat monthly).

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, the site states you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time.

faqs.question: Does SupportBee have AI features?
faqs.answer: No AI capabilities are mentioned on the SupportBee website.

faqs.question: What's included in the Enterprise plan?
faqs.answer: Everything in Startup plus enterprise integrations, business hours, a customer portal, audit log and data history, and portal access for customer groups.

use_cases.title: Email-first support teams
use_cases.description: Manage customer emails as tickets without leaving an inbox-like interface.

use_cases.title: Professional services
use_cases.description: Law firms and accounting firms tracking client email requests as tickets.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is SupportBee?
paragraphs: SupportBee is a ticketing system that converts customer emails into organized support tickets that a team can assign, comment on, and resolve together.
It includes a shared team inbox, a customer-facing portal, an integrated knowledge base (KBee), and API access, priced per seat across two plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who SupportBee is for
paragraphs: SupportBee fits small support teams and professional services firms that want an email-like ticketing workflow without a steep learning curve.

faqs.question: Does ProProfs Help Desk have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan gives 1 agent unlimited inboxes and ticket history with 100 emails/month at $0.

faqs.question: Does it use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, an AI Support Agent resolves routine tickets, summarizes threads, suggests responses, and adjusts tone, with more advanced AI (emotion detection) on higher tiers.

faqs.question: Is there a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, native iOS and Android apps are available.

faqs.question: How much does it cost?
faqs.answer: Paid plans start at Essentials for $29.99/month ($23.88/month billed annually), up to Customer Delight Suite starting at $499/month.

faqs.question: Is there a trial or guarantee?
faqs.answer: All plans include a 15-day money-back guarantee with no credit card required for trials.

use_cases.title: Solo agents starting free
use_cases.description: Free plan covers a single agent with unlimited inboxes and basic ticketing.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted ticket resolution
use_cases.description: Essentials and Business plans add AI response drafting, categorization, and tone rewriting.

use_cases.title: Omnichannel enterprise support

features: Live Chat, Knowledge Base, Survey Maker, and Qualaroo included

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ProProfs Help Desk?
paragraphs: ProProfs Help Desk is a ticketing platform that centralizes email, live chat, messaging, and web forms into one inbox, with an AI Support Agent that summarizes tickets, drafts responses, and detects sentiment.
Higher tiers add omnichannel messaging, advanced AI (emotion detection, data redaction), and enterprise security controls like SSO/SAML.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ProProfs Help Desk is for
paragraphs: It suits solo agents and small teams that want a free starting point, as well as growing support teams that want AI-assisted ticket handling as volume increases.

faqs.answer: Yes, LiveAgent offers a 30-day free trial with no credit card required.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is LiveAgent?
paragraphs: LiveAgent is an omnichannel customer service platform that unifies ticketing, live chat, an AI chatbot, and a call center with IVR into a single dashboard.
It lists 175+ features and 200+ integrations, with AI tools including an Answer Assistant that polishes agent replies and an Autoresponder that resolves eligible tickets automatically.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who LiveAgent is for
paragraphs: LiveAgent fits support teams that need phone support alongside chat and ticketing, and teams serving international customers thanks to its 100+ language AI chatbot.

enrichment.short_description: B2B customer support platform with account-level ticketing, AI-driven insights, and a Customer Distress Index to flag at-risk accounts.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: TeamSupport is a B2B customer support platform with AI ticket insights and a Customer Distress Index, starting at $45/month for up to 5 users.

Professional and Scale plans include unlimited users

faqs.question: Does TeamSupport offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: The pricing page does not mention a free trial.

faqs.question: How much does TeamSupport cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $45/month (Starter, billed annually, up to 5 users), with Professional at $65/month and Scale at $85/month, both with unlimited users.

faqs.question: Is live chat included?
faqs.answer: No, messaging and live chat are a separate add-on priced at $15/month per agent on every plan.

faqs.question: What is the Customer Distress Index?
faqs.answer: It's TeamSupport's proprietary scoring system for identifying at-risk customer accounts.

faqs.question: Where is TeamSupport based?
faqs.answer: TeamSupport's headquarters is listed at 5005 Lyndon B Johnson Fwy, Dallas, TX.

use_cases.title: B2B SaaS support and success
use_cases.description: Account-level ticketing and playbooks for onboarding, retaining, and expanding accounts.
use_cases.audience: B2B SaaS support and success teams

use_cases.title: Account health monitoring
use_cases.description: Customer Distress Index flags at-risk accounts before they churn.

use_cases.title: Manufacturing support teams
use_cases.description: Ticketing and product analytics for manufacturing-sector support operations.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is TeamSupport?
paragraphs: TeamSupport is a customer support and success platform built for B2B support teams, providing account-level ticketing with a 360-degree customer view rather than individual-contact-based tickets.
It includes AI-driven ticket analysis and a proprietary Customer Distress Index that flags accounts at risk of churning, plus customer playbooks for structured success workflows.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who TeamSupport is for
paragraphs: TeamSupport is aimed at B2B SaaS and manufacturing support and success teams that manage multi-contact accounts and want account-health scoring built into their ticketing system.

enrichment.short_description: Multi-channel help desk with a built-in AI chatbot, agent assist co-pilot, and flexible cloud, private-cloud, or self-hosted deployment.

features.title: Unified Inbox
features.description: Combines email, chat, voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and social media in one place.

features.description: Resolves common issues before they reach human agents.

SOC II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA certified
Deskpro AI (chatbot, agent assist, automations) is built into the platform rather than a separate product
Enterprise plan supports 22 AWS regions for data residency needs
cons: Team plan requires a minimum of 5 agents and Enterprise requires 25, raising the cost floor for very small teams
Deskpro AI and white-labeling are gated behind the Professional plan and above
Exact free trial length isn't stated on the site

faqs.question: Does Deskpro offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free trial is available, though the exact duration isn't specified on the site.

faqs.question: How much does Deskpro cost?
faqs.answer: Cloud pricing starts at $39/agent/month for the Team plan (minimum 5 agents), up to $99/agent/month for Enterprise (minimum 25 agents).

faqs.question: Can Deskpro be self-hosted?
faqs.answer: Yes, deployment options include cloud, private cloud, self-hosted, on-premise, and sovereign data centers.

faqs.question: Does Deskpro include AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Deskpro AI includes a chatbot, an agent assist co-pilot, and workflow automations based on intent, sentiment, and language.

faqs.question: Is Deskpro compliant with security standards?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is SOC II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA certified.

use_cases.title: Regulated industries
use_cases.description: HIPAA-compliant hosting and on-premise deployment for healthcare and government support teams.

use_cases.title: Self-hosted deployments
use_cases.description: Private cloud or self-hosted options for organizations with strict data residency requirements.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted support teams
use_cases.description: Deskpro AI chatbot and agent assist reduce ticket volume reaching human agents.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Deskpro?
paragraphs: Deskpro is a multi-channel help desk covering email, chat, voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and social media, with Deskpro AI providing a chatbot, an agent assist co-pilot, and workflow automations.
It differentiates itself with flexible deployment, offering cloud, private cloud, self-hosted, on-premise, and sovereign data center options alongside SOC II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA certification.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Deskpro is for
paragraphs: Deskpro suits mid-size to enterprise support teams, especially in regulated industries like healthcare and government, that need deployment flexibility beyond a standard multi-tenant cloud help desk.

enrichment.short_description: AI-powered HRIS that centralizes employee data, workflow automation, and an AI Companion for employee self-service, for growing companies.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Humaans is an AI-powered HRIS for people data, workflow automation, and an AI Companion for employee self-service, with quote-based pricing.

features.title: Employee Database
features.description: Central system of record for employee data across 300+ global locations.

features.title: Workflow Automation
features.description: Automates requests, approvals, onboarding, and offboarding.

features.title: Absence Management & Timesheets
features.description: Tracks time off and logs compliance-related time data.

features.title: Performance Reviews & Engagement Tracking
features.description: Built-in review cycles and employee engagement monitoring.

features.title: People Analytics
features.description: Real-time workforce insights and reporting.

features.title: AI Companion
features.description: Gives employees instant answers to policy and document questions.

features.title: Compensation & Headcount Planning
features.description: Tools for managing pay and planning team growth.

features.title: API, Webhooks & Integrations
features.description: Pre-built integrations plus a robust API and webhooks.

pros: Supports HR operations across 300+ global locations
AI Companion gives employees self-service answers without HR involvement
SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001:2022, and GDPR compliance documented
Enterprise plan adds SSO, unlimited custom fields, and audit log exports
cons: No public pricing; plan costs require contacting sales
Custom permission roles are capped at 2 on the Growth plan
Supported UI languages aren't documented on the site

faqs.question: How much does Humaans cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing is not published; the site directs prospects to contact sales for Growth, Enterprise, and Athena plan pricing.

faqs.question: Does Humaans include AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, an AI Companion answers employee questions instantly, and an 'Agentic AI Workforce' (Athena) handles admin work end-to-end.

faqs.question: Where is Humaans based?
faqs.answer: Humaans lists offices in London, New York City, and San Francisco.

faqs.question: Is Humaans compliant with security standards?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001:2022, and GDPR compliant.

faqs.question: What's included in the Enterprise plan?
faqs.answer: All Growth plan features plus SSO, unlimited custom permission roles and fields, webhooks, a dedicated sandbox, and a dedicated customer success manager.

use_cases.title: Multi-country HR system of record
use_cases.description: Centralizes employee data across 300+ global locations for scaling companies.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted employee self-service
use_cases.description: AI Companion answers policy and document questions so HR spends less time on repetitive queries.

use_cases.title: Enterprise security and compliance
use_cases.description: Enterprise plan adds SSO, audit logs, and unlimited custom fields for larger organizations.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Humaans?
paragraphs: Humaans is an AI-powered HRIS that centralizes employee data and automates HR workflows like onboarding, offboarding, absence management, and performance reviews across 300+ global locations.
Its AI Companion answers employee questions about policies and documents instantly, and an 'Agentic AI Workforce' offering (Athena) is positioned to handle HR admin tasks end-to-end.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Humaans is for
paragraphs: Humaans targets growing companies that need a single system of record for HR data across multiple countries, with an Enterprise tier for organizations that require SSO and stricter security controls.
